# dox

Deterministic AGENTS.md tree engine - keeps a hierarchy of docs as a code map so agents load only the relevant ones. Core CLI in `bin/dox`; enforcement in `hooks/`.

## Conventions
- Document stable contracts, not history. Keep each AGENTS.md concise and current.
- Before editing a path, read the AGENTS.md chain from here down to it (`dox context <path>`).
- After a meaningful change, update the affected AGENTS.md prose. `dox sync` handles the index.

<!-- dox:index -->
<!-- generated by `dox sync` - do not edit by hand -->
### Map
- [`hooks/`](hooks/AGENTS.md) - Enforcement layers that wire the `dox` CLI into wherever edits happen. Each layer is deterministic; the model is only invoked to write pr...
